caption: A person's hands interact with a holiday greeting card resting on a light-colored, wood-grain surface. The card is enclosed in a clear plastic sleeve and features a grey background with a white decorative panel. On this panel, blue-toned floral illustrations adorn the left side, and the text "SENDING YOU A LITTLE Yuletide Cheer" is printed, with "Yuletide Cheer" in a cursive font. A small silver ribbon is tied to the left side of the card. To the left of the card, a white box with a barcode is partially visible. Throughout the sequence, the person holds the card's left edge with their left hand. Their right hand enters the frame and reaches toward the right side of the plastic sleeve, eventually gripping the edge to lift or adjust the card.
